title: Library Lockfile Schema
description: JSON Schema for .library.lock — the per-project lockfile recording every installed library item with its source provenance, checksum, and license.

installed.description: Ordered list of installed library items. Each entry records one canonical install (skills, agents, or prompts).

lockfile_entry.description: A single installed library item with full provenance metadata.

name.description: Unique name of the installed item. Must match the catalog entry name in library.yaml.

type.description: Primitive type of the installed item.

source.description: Origin URL or local path from which the item was fetched. For GitHub sources, this is the browser-form URL (https://github.com/<org>/<repo>/blob/<branch>/<path>). For local sources, the absolute or relative file path.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the source repository at install time. Provides reproducibility: re-running /library sync with this SHA yields identical content. Use 'local' for non-git local sources.

install_target.description: Relative path of the installation directory within the project (e.g. .claude/skills/dolt/ for a project-local skill). Trailing slash is required.

install_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the item was installed or last refreshed.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the primary artifact file (SKILL.md for skills, the .md file for agents/prompts). Used by /library audit to detect drift between the lockfile record and the current on-disk state.

license.description: SPDX license identifier of the installed item (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, proprietary). Use 'unknown' when no license information is available.

bridge_symlinks.description: List of symlink bridges created during dual-install (per CL-b4o name-collision policy). Each string is a human-readable description of the form '<link-path> -> <target-path>'. Empty list means no bridge was created (single-harness install).
